nl_query: What is the average time between exam schedule creation and board creation?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(T2.created_at - T1.created_at) AS average_time_difference
FROM exam_schedule_cache AS T1
JOIN board AS T2 ON T1.exam_id = T2.exam_id
